success_criteria: No reference to _OLD_LAUNCHD_PLIST or the /Library/LaunchDaemons path remains anywhere in launchd.py or installer.py (grep returns zero hits).

migrate_from_daemon() is deleted entirely. The macOS install path (_install_darwin) unconditionally runs the clean path — stop, ensure_port_free, install the LaunchAgent — with NO branch on an old-plist existing and NO sudo call anywhere in the steady-state install or uninstall path.
uninstall() no longer touches the old LaunchDaemon plist (remove the _OLD_LAUNCHD_PLIST sudo unload+rm block).

Dead migration tests are removed; the clean-install and uninstall paths retain/gain coverage (happy path installs LaunchAgent and reports running; uninstall removes the LaunchAgent plist and boots out the job; a stale-agent reinstall is idempotent). No test references the old LaunchDaemon migration.
make check exits 0. OO ratchet (make check-oo) does not regress on touched files; run make update-oo after and stage .oo-baseline.json + .oo-audit.jsonl.
No backwards-compat shim or tombstone comment left behind (PL-PP-1) — the migration is removed completely, not aliased or commented out.

Commit incrementally — one commit per logical step (file group, single concern, or single PR-equivalent slice). Each commit must pass make check. Do not accumulate more than 30 minutes of uncommitted changes.
Do NOT bump the version, edit CHANGELOG.md, or edit DESIGN.md — the leader owns those. Do NOT open a PR. Work on the current branch (fix/service-install-reconcile).

Implement the design at .tmp/missions/results/hook-repo-name-design.md with ONE simplification: NO special-casing of any directory. The rule is exactly: spoken repo name = the repo of the session's cwd. Steps: (1) hook_payload.py carries cwd:Path|None on every payload
parsed from the stdin 'cwd' field
improving method_ratio off 0.75; (2) hooks.py *_cmd handlers resolve find_config_dir(payload.cwd) and gate on it returning None (no config there -> silent
which is natural not a special case)
and thread the resolved dir into handle_stop so read and vibe-write agree; (3) the seven shell hook scripts extract cwd from stdin via jq mirroring subagent.sh
fix the gate to ${cwd}/.punt-labs/vox/vox.md|vox.local.md
and DELETE the dead mcp-proxy/serve.port relay branch entirely (PL-PP-1); (4) when cwd is absent fall back to existing Path.cwd() default in find_config_dir

do not add suppression logic; (5) no punt-labs or parent special-case anywhere. Tests: cwd present->repo name; cwd in subdir->resolves the repo; cwd missing->None payload field; gate matches vox.md not config.md; no script references mcp-proxy/serve.port/config.md after edit. mypy
pyright
shellcheck) must pass; OO ratchet must not regress. Add a CHANGELOG entry under [Unreleased] Fixed. Do not open a PR.
